title: artemisia gurganica
intro: Artemisia gurganica, also known as Gorgan wormwood, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. The health benefits of Artemisia gurganica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Artemisia gurganica can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
